scan.access_pattern: sequential contiguous row partitions; each worker scans one static range and applies the shipdate predicate inline in the fused aggregation loop

data_structures.aggregation: per-thread uint8_t key_to_slot[65536] initialized to 0xFF plus compact AggState slots[8] and populated_keys[8]; packed uint16(returnflag, linestatus) key for O(1) direct slot lookup

optimization_notes: The root cause is a logical-plan and scheduling mismatch: the shipdate zonemap is completely non-selective for this dataset (all 458 blocks are mixed, with 0 full-pass and 0 skipped), so the classify-and-morsel path adds extra block-list construction, loop control, and dynamic scheduling without eliminating any payload work. Strategy category A/D: remove the zonemap phase entirely, return to one fused sequential scan over static contiguous row partitions, keep the cache-resident per-thread direct key-to-slot table for the tiny 6-group aggregation, and let each thread stream its own contiguous slice so hardware prefetch and bandwidth dominate instead of scheduler overhead.
